properties.name: Relay Server URL
properties.description: ngrok public HTTPS URL for the relay server (e.g. https://abc123.ngrok-free.app)

properties.name: Fabric Name
properties.description: Name of the SDA fabric

properties.name: Deploy Security
properties.description: Deploy Phase 6 (dot1x, RADIUS, CTS)? Default false.

properties.name: Force Deploy
properties.description: Skip existing config check? Default false.

properties.name: Deployment Failed
properties.description: Tracks if any phase failed

properties.name: Failed Phase
properties.description: Name of the phase that failed

properties.name: Phase Result JSON
properties.description: JSON response from last relay call

Complete SD-Access fabric deployment (ISIS + LISP + VXLAN + VRF + Access VLANs) via RESTCONF relay server.

Deploys 6 phases with pre/post checks, verification, and rollback on failure.

Architecture: Meraki Workflow -> Python Activity (requests.post) -> ngrok -> Relay Server (Flask) -> RESTCONF -> Catalyst Switches

Border: C9500-32C @ 192.168.128.9
Edge: C9300X-48HXN @ 192.168.128.7
Relay: Ubuntu @ 192.168.128.10

Project: SJC23-SDA POC
Verify RESTCONF reachability, IOS-XE version, memory, interfaces on both switches via relay server.
properties.script_body:
import sys
import json
import requests

relay_url = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else ""
fabric_name = sys.argv[2] if len(sys.argv) > 2 else ""
force = sys.argv[3] if len(sys.argv) > 3 else "false"

url = f"{relay_url}/api/v2/precheck"
payload = {"fabric_name": fabric_name, "force": force.lower() == "true"}

try:
    resp = requests.post(url, json=payload, timeout=60, verify=False)
    result = resp.json()
    status = result.get("status", "fail")
    succeeded = status == "pass"
    result_json = json.dumps(result)
except Exception as e:
    succeeded = False
    status = "error"
    result_json = json.dumps({"status": "error", "error": str(e)})

print(result_json)

properties.description: Route based on pre-check result. If pre-check failed, mark deployment as failed and stop.
Pre-check succeeded, continue to deployment phases.
Pre-check failed. Set deployment as failed.
Mark deployment as failed at Pre-Check stage.
Check if deployment should continue to Phase 1 (Underlay).
Deployment not failed, continue to Phase 1.
ISIS + BFD + PIM + Loopbacks + P2P links
Deploy ISIS underlay routing, BFD, PIM, Loopback0, P2P links via RESTCONF relay.
properties.script_body:
import sys
import json
import requests

relay_url = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else ""
fabric_name = sys.argv[2] if len(sys.argv) > 2 else ""

url = f"{relay_url}/api/v2/deploy/phase1-underlay"
payload = {"fabric_name": fabric_name}

try:
    resp = requests.post(url, json=payload, timeout=120, verify=False)
    result = resp.json()
    succeeded = resp.status_code == 200 and result.get("status") != "error"
    result_json = json.dumps(result)
except Exception as e:
    succeeded = False
    result_json = json.dumps({"status": "error", "error": str(e)})

print(result_json)

properties.description: Check if Phase 1 underlay deployment succeeded.
Phase 1 deploy succeeded. Run verification.
Wait 15s for ISIS convergence, then verify ISIS/BFD/PIM neighbors.
properties.script_body:
import sys
import json
import requests
import time

relay_url = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else ""
fabric_name = sys.argv[2] if len(sys.argv) > 2 else ""

time.sleep(15)

url = f"{relay_url}/api/v2/verify/phase1-underlay"
payload = {"fabric_name": fabric_name}

try:
    resp = requests.post(url, json=payload, timeout=60, verify=False)
    result = resp.json()
    succeeded = result.get("status") == "pass"
    result_json = json.dumps(result)
except Exception as e:
    succeeded = False
    result_json = json.dumps({"status": "error", "error": str(e)})

print(result_json)

properties.description: Phase 1 deploy failed.
Mark deployment as failed at Phase 1.
Deployment already failed, skip Phase 1.
Check if deployment should continue to Phase 2 (LISP).
LISP Map-Server/Map-Resolver + xTR configuration
Deploy LISP control plane (MS/MR + xTR) via RESTCONF relay.

properties.description: Run 22 validation checks and rollback if failed

properties.script_body:
import sys
import json
import requests

relay_url = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else ""
fabric_name = sys.argv[2] if len(sys.argv) > 2 else ""

url = f"{relay_url}/api/v2/postcheck"
payload = {"fabric_name": fabric_name}

try:
    resp = requests.post(url, json=payload, timeout=120, verify=False)
    result = resp.json()
    status = result.get("status", "fail")
    score = result.get("score", "0/22")
    succeeded = status == "pass"
    result_json = json.dumps(result)
except Exception as e:
    succeeded = False
    score = "error"
    result_json = json.dumps({"status": "error", "error": str(e)})

print(result_json)

import sys
import json
import requests

relay_url = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else ""
fabric_name = sys.argv[2] if len(sys.argv) > 2 else ""

url = f"{relay_url}/api/v2/rollback"
payload = {"fabric_name": fabric_name}

try:
    resp = requests.post(url, json=payload, timeout=180, verify=False)
    result = resp.json()
    result_json = json.dumps(result)
except Exception as e:
    result_json = json.dumps({"status": "error", "error": str(e)})

print(result_json)

properties.description: Catches any phase failure flagged during Phases 1-5 that skipped post-check.
